content: Phase A (Bright Data Unlocker) — unlocker, dispatcher, registry, smoke test
Phase B.1 — explored API-Sports basketball + existing pace stub

Phase B.7 — wired HistoricalProfilePanel into MatchCard
Phase B.8 — integration smoke test (compute + trap signals + tri-backend editorial)
Phase C (Baseball Historical Enrichment) — pending user confirmation
